name: claudeqb
description: Repo-aware, gated, multi-step project planning workflow for Claude Code: a senior-architect master plan, an existing-project autopsy, autonomous phase decomposition, a coverage/quality audit validated by a bundled read-only checker, and a gated implementation step. Produces English planning docs under Planner-docs/. In-session and zero-setup; delegates each long autonomous step to a matching subagent.
